STYLE_GUIDE.md.summary: Markdown style guide defining shadcn-inspired UI rules, forbidding gradients, and giving implementation hints for the coding agent.

index.html.summary: Full HTML file now renders a Conway's Game of Life simulation with a canvas board, generation and alive counters, speed and zoom controls, play/pause and step controls, plus clear and randomize actions.

script.js.summary: Full JavaScript file now implements Conway's Game of Life with a resizable canvas, clickable cell editing, speed control, zoom control, play/pause, single-step, clear, randomize, and automatic stop/restart after 1000 generations.

styles.css.summary: Full stylesheet now provides a clean shadcn-inspired layout for the Game of Life app, including the canvas board, control panel, responsive layout, and accessible button and slider styling.
